steps.title: Identify the rates and variables
steps.content: Let $x$ = number of sandwiches and $y$ = number of salads. Each sandwich takes 1.5 minutes and each salad takes 1.9 minutes. The employee spends a total of 46.1 minutes preparing all items.

steps.title: Build the total time equation
steps.content:
For each item type, multiply the time per item by the quantity:
  • Sandwiches: $1.5x$ minutes
  • Salads: $1.9y$ minutes
Setting the sum of these times equal to the total:
$$1.5x + 1.9y = 46.1$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
